home.meta.title: SSVP | Smart Security Validation Platform
home.hero.title: Manage the path from network scanning to security decisions on one platform.
home.hero.copy: Smart Security Validation Platform unifies testing, analysis, and action workflows for technical teams. Its modular architecture, role-based access, and reporting accelerate internal pentest operations.
home.features.title: Why SSVP?
home.features.item1.title: One Flow, Multiple Tools
home.features.item1.desc: Combine different perspectives in a single test session with Nmap, Masscan, and netdiscover.
home.features.item2.title: Secure Access
home.features.item2.desc: Access to the pentest panel and backend APIs is automatically blocked without an active session.
home.features.item3.title: Enterprise Readiness
home.features.item3.desc: Build operational standards with legal consent steps, role-based authorization, and configurable timeout settings.
home.about.title: Overview
home.about.desc: The platform helps security, SOC, and infrastructure teams work on a shared dataset. Scan results are centralized, findings become traceable, and reporting becomes faster.
home.contact.title: Contact
home.contact.desc: Reach out for demo, training, or internal deployment requests.
home.login.title: SSVP Login
home.login.info: Log in to continue to the pentest panel.
home.offer.title: Quote Request
home.offer.info: Share your basic details and submit your request.
home.offer.name: Full Name
home.offer.success: Your request has been received. Our team will contact you soon.
home.offer.error.required: Please provide name, email, and at least 10 characters for request details.
